summary: A brief biographical profile of Andrew Ng from Stanford HAI, detailing his roles in founding Coursera, DeepLearning.AI, and the Google Brain project. It highlights his foundational work in massive-scale deep learning and his overarching goal to democratize education globally.

principles.statement: Everyone in the world should have access to a great education, for free.
principles.rationale: This core goal drove his work in developing Stanford's main MOOC platform and founding Coursera to scale high-quality education globally.
principles.source_quote: Ng’s goal is to give everyone in the world access to a great education, for free.
